headline: What Does Freedom Broker’s Call on EQT Corp (EQT) Stock Reveal?
summary: EQT Corp (NYSE:EQT) is one of the best stocks to buy according to David Greenspan’s Slate Path Capital. The stock makes up 3.7% of its reported equity portfolio. headline: Jefferies Trims EQT Price Target by $2. Here is Why
summary: With an average upside potential of 33.65% according to Wall Street analysts, EQT Corporation (NYSE:EQT) is included among the 10 Most Promising Energy Stocks to Buy Now.
